Stipulation To Amend Cross-Defendants Stephen Donnelly, Individually And Dba House To Home Remodeling'S Answer To Jonathan Craig And Patty Nozato'S Cross-Complaint; [Proposed] Order
Off Calendar Nov-16-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:
